song.title: O Master Let Me Walk With Thee
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) O Master, let me walk with Thee In lowly paths of service free; Tell me Thy secret, help me bear The strain of toil, the fret of care.
[V2] 2) Help me the slow of heart to move By some clear, winning word of love; Teach me the wayward feet to stay, And guide them in the homeward way.
[V3] 3) Teach me Thy patience; still with Thee In closer, dearer company, In work that keeps faith sweet and strong, In trust that triumphs over wrong.
[V4] 4) In hope that sends a shining ray Far down the future’s broad’ning way, In peace that only Thou canst give, With Thee, O Master, let me live.
song.author: Washington Gladden
